violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a bowl and kitchen utensils in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Equipment was removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and the back exit, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both prep units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2026
The hand-sink handle was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Inside of the 1 door reach in freezer -Dry storage shelves -Area across from the 3-bay sink Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install an airgap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
